extensionDescription.message: Advanced real-time video and audio processing for any website with equalizer, effects and presets

presetDescriptionDefault.message: Reset all settings to default values.

presetDescriptionCinematic.message: Enhances contrast and color for a movie-like experience with slightly boosted bass.

presetDescriptionVintage.message: Gives a warm, old-school look with subtle sepia tone and slight blur, audio has a vintage radio effect.

presetDescriptionNight.message: Reduces brightness and blue light for comfortable night viewing, with softer audio.

presetDescriptionBassBoost.message: Significantly boosts bass frequencies for powerful low-end response.

presetDescriptionVoiceClarity.message: Enhances vocal frequencies and reduces bass for clearer dialogue.

presetDescriptionWarm.message: Adds warm, cozy tones with enhanced low frequencies. Perfect for relaxed viewing.

presetDescriptionCool.message: Creates cool, crisp tones with enhanced high frequencies. Ideal for modern content.

presetDescriptionHighContrast.message: Dramatically enhances contrast and sharpness for maximum visual impact.

donateMessage.message: If you enjoy using Video & Audio Manager, consider supporting further development:

donateViaCoffee.message: Donate via Buy Me a Coffee

tooltipBrightness.message: Adjusts the overall lightness/darkness of the video

tooltipContrast.message: Controls the difference between light and dark areas

tooltipSharpness.message: Adjusts edge definition (positive) or softens image (negative)

tooltipHue.message: Rotates all colors by the specified angle

tooltipGrayscale.message: Converts the image to grayscale at the specified percentage

tooltipInvert.message: Inverts the colors of the video

tooltipSepia.message: Applies a vintage sepia tone effect

tooltipBlur.message: Adds Gaussian blur to the video

tooltipVignette.message: Darkens the edges of the video for a cinematic look

tooltipStereoReverse.message: Swaps left and right audio channels

tooltipDelay.message: Adds echo/delay effect to the audio

confirmReset.message: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default?

confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the "$1" preset?

enterPresetName.message: Enter a name for your preset:

selectPresetMessage.message: Click a preset to apply it instantly.

tooltipSpeed.message: Changes playback speed from 0.25x to 3x (pitch is preserved)

reverbQualityHint.message: Higher quality uses a longer reverb tail and more CPU.

shortcutsHint.message: Shortcuts are managed by the browser. Use the button below to change them.

settingsResetDone.message: All settings have been reset to defaults
